components.name: Arduino-ESP32
components.usage: Optional Arduino-as-component benchmark and example comparison path.
components.source: Local ignored checkout from tools/ensure-frameworks.sh or ARC_ARDUINO_PATH.
notice_required_when: Arduino-as-component sources, binaries, or benchmark bundles ship with a deliverable

components.name: ESP-IDF
components.usage: Firmware build substrate, component headers, drivers, FreeRTOS, lwIP, mbedTLS, NimBLE, and storage stacks.
components.source: Pinned ESP-IDF checkout installed outside this repository by env.sh, CI, or tools/sync-idf.sh.
notice_required_when: firmware images, SDK bundles, source packages, or validation artifacts include ESP-IDF material

components.name: GitHub Actions
components.usage: Pinned workflow actions build docs, run CodeQL, and upload CI or Pages artifacts.
components.repository_state: remote CI action providers, not vendored source
notice_required_when: workflow action source, action binaries, or hosted action artifacts are bundled into a deliverable

components.name: Toolchains, Python packages, Go tools, and host OS packages
components.usage: Compilers, Python helpers, Go tools, host shells, and OS packages used to build or validate Arc.
components.source: Installed separately by the developer machine, CI image, ESP-IDF tooling, or host package manager.
components.repository_state: external host tools, not Arc-covered source
notice_required_when: toolchains, Python packages, Go binaries, or host package contents are redistributed with a deliverable

components.name: VitePress and npm dependencies
components.usage: Builds the docs site from package.json and package-lock.json.
components.repository_state: node_modules is ignored; lockfile is tracked for reproducibility
notice_required_when: the built docs site is distributed together with npm dependency source or bundled runtime assets
